_comment: Music-pillar catalog for THE HAND-ME-DOWN. The foobar2000 app + LABELS/ folder + DISCOGRAPHY view read from this. Per-band -> source mapping is UNRESOLVED: resolve at build by fetching the four Bandcamp pages below (also pull release art, embed IDs, track lists). Represent all names factually as real catalog entries; design around the scene's DIY aesthetic; do NOT generate new crude content. Exact spellings/diacritics preserved on purpose.

bands.name: Baron Von Asshole And The Wizards Of Shit

_dedupe_note: Source list had 32 lines; 'Dead Snakes' and 'Right Here, Right Now' appeared twice — collapsed to single entries here. 30 unique acts.
_build_tasks: Fetch each source URL; map every band to its label(s) and fill a 'sources' array per band.
Pull release artwork (cover thumbs) for foobar2000 playlist rows + LABELS/ folder icons.
Capture Bandcamp embed/track IDs so the foobar2000 app can actually play tracks.
Flag any acts not found on the four sources for manual confirmation.
